entry.data:
PARTLY CLOUDY THIS EVENING, THEN MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
SOUTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH THIS EVENING, BECOMING LIGHT AND VARIABLE
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
SHOWERS LIKELY, MAINLY IN THE MORNING
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
SOUTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH, BECOMING NORTH IN THE AFTERNOON
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING, THEN MOSTLY CLEAR AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
NORTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
NORTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 50S
NORTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

CLEAR
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S

MOSTLY CLEAR
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S

PARTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT
